name: sox2_sox3_chr5_chr14
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: SOX2/SOX3 TGD ohnologs (sox2 on chr5, sox3 on chr14); neural progenitor markers. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
